response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of polyglot full-stack engineering experience and has operated at Staff level with high-throughput distributed systems, but the resume shows no meaningful alignment with the core technical domain of this Principal Growth/Experimentation role. There is no evidence of experimentation platform design, A/B testing infrastructure, feature-flagging systems, telemetry pipelines, or statistical/experimental analysis — the foundational capabilities this IC6 position requires. The candidate's strengths lie in product engineering and developer tooling; the systematic, data-driven growth engineering mandate is entirely absent from the work history.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems with demonstrated end-to-end product ownership
High-throughput systems exposure at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second, including low-latency async I/O, caching, and real-time metadata pipelines
Staff-level technical initiative evidenced by open-source project leadership (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and community knowledge-sharing through workshops and conference talks
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation platform design, A/B testing infrastructure, feature-flagging, bias detection, or rollout-risk management — the primary technical domain of this role
No telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipelines, or experimental/statistical analysis work visible anywhere in the resume; the data aptitude requirement is essentially unmet

Resume framing and title ('Senior Software Developer') fall short of the Principal/IC6 scope; no documented cross-team systemic influence, architectural ownership at scale, or multi-workstream initiative leadership

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or A/B platform experience
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
High-throughput distributed systems work at Sociomantic
